== Kim Chi-yum ♀ ==
She carries a jar on her head to make sure her kimchi is best. 

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Kim Chi-yum, complete the [[Koryeo]] Key Clue, "Perfect Kimchi."

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆ ===
After 3 letters back and forth, Kim Chi-yum will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift Handmade Kimchi ({{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +200, Kimchi +100). 

===★☆☆ > ★★☆ ===
After 3 letters back and forth, Kim Chi-yum will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift the [[Alchemy Furnace]], unlocking the ability to use Wish Coins.

===★★☆ > ★★★=== 
After 4 letters back and forth, Kim Chi-yum will move in permanently with her minion, Koryeo Snail. This will also unlock the [[Home Base|Minion Room]] and Chore Dispatch ability.

==Rent ==
[[File:Kim Chi-yum rent.png|left]] 

Kim Chi-yum's rent is collected on '''Monday''' and found on the portrait on the wall. 

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Koryeon Treasure Map, +10}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Sleeping Gypsy|blue}} +10; {{RewardIconWithLink|Guernica|purple}} +20; {{RewardIconWithLink|Mona Lisa|orange}} +40

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|King Sejong's Portrait|green}}

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn B-tads!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable" 
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|5k B-tads 
|-
|★★
|5k B-tads
|-
|★★★
|5k B-tads
|-
|★★★★
|10k B-tads
|-
|★★★★★
|20k B-tads
|-
|★★★★★★
|40k B-tads
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Portland Vase}}{{Relink|Portland Vase}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Klein Bottle}}{{Relink|Klein Bottle}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Jade Cup}}{{Relink|Jade Cup}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Hannibal's Cup}}{{Relink|Hannibal's Cup}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Lotus Chalice}}{{Relink|Lotus Chalice}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Fire Chalice}}{{Relink|Fire Chalice}}
|}

==Cuisine of Kim Chi-yum==
Kim Chi-yum enjoys cooking. Only those dear to her are lucky enough to experience how delicious her dishes can be!

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||Snail TECH +5||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +0.3%
|-
|2||180||2k||Snail TECH +10||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +0.6%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||Snail TECH +15||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +0.9%
|-
|4||200||8k||Snail TECH +20||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +1.2%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||Snail TECH +25||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +1.5%
|-
|6||220||18k||Snail TECH +30||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +1.8%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||Snail TECH +35||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +2.1%
|-
|8||240||32k||Snail TECH +40||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +2.4%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||Snail TECH +45||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +2.7%
|-
|10||260||50k||Snail TECH +50||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +3%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||Snail TECH +55||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +3.3%
|-
|12||285||72k||Snail TECH +60||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +3.6%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||Snail TECH +65||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +3.9%
|-
|14||315||98k||Snail TECH +70||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +4.2%
|-
|15||330||112k||Snail TECH +75||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +4.5%
|-
|16||345||123k||Snail TECH +80||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +4.8%
|-
|17||360||144k||Snail TECH +85||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +5.1%
|-
|18||375||162k||Snail TECH +90||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +5.4%
|-
|19||390||180k||Snail TECH +95||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +5.7%
|-
|20||400||200k||Snail TECH +100||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6%
|-
|21||420||220k||Snail TECH +105||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6.3%
|-
|22||440||242k||Snail TECH +110||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6.6%
|-
|23||460||264k||Snail TECH +115||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6.9%
|-
|24||480||285k||Snail TECH +120||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +7.2%
|-
|25||500||309k||Snail TECH +125||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +7.5%
|-
|26||520||333k||Snail TECH +130||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +7.8%
|-
|27||540||357k||Snail TECH +135||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +8.1%
|-
|28||560||381k||Snail TECH +140||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +8.4%
|-
|29||580||405k||Snail TECH +145||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +8.7%
|-
|30||600||429k||Snail TECH +150||Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +9%
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Cuisine of Kim Chi-yum is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +10
|-
|2||4k||Angel Minion MAX +2||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +20
|-
|3||6k||Angel Minion MAX +3||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +30
|-
|4||8k||Angel Minion MAX +4||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +40
|-
|5||10k||Angel Minion MAX +5||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +50
|-
|6||12k||Angel Minion MAX +6||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +60
|-
|7||14k||Angel Minion MAX +7||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +70
|-
|8||16k||Angel Minion MAX +8||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +80 
|-
|9||18k||Angel Minion MAX +9||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +90
|-
|10||20k||Angel Minion MAX +10||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +100
|-
|11||22k||Angel Minion MAX +11||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +110
|-
|12||24k||Angel Minion MAX +12||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +120
|-
|13||26k||Angel Minion MAX +13||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +130
|-
|14||28k||Angel Minion MAX +14||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +140
|-
|15||30k||Angel Minion MAX +15||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +150
|-
|16||32k||Angel Minion MAX +16||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +160
|-
|17||34k||Angel Minion MAX +17||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +170
|-
|18||36k||Angel Minion MAX +18||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +180
|-
|19||38k||Angel Minion MAX +19||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +190
|-
|20||40k||Angel Minion MAX +20||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +200
|-
|21||42k||Angel Minion MAX +21||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +210
|-
|22||44k||Angel Minion MAX +22||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +220
|-
|23||46k||Angel Minion MAX +23||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +230
|-
|24|||48k||Angel Minion MAX +24||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +240
|-
|25||50k||Angel Minion MAX +25||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +250
|-
|26||52k||Angel Minion MAX +26||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +260
|-
|27||54k||Angel Minion MAX +27||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +270
|-
|28||56k||Angel Minion MAX +28||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +280
|-
|29||58k||Angel Minion MAX +29||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +290
|-
|30||60k||Angel Minion MAX +30||Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Kim Chi-yum specializes in '''Angel Genes''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Angel Gene is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|96||100
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Koryeo Snail==
Children Kim Chi-yum had with her ex. After the breakup, she worked hard to raise the children by herself. Little snails naturally grew up decently.

===Special Ability - Cooking Squad:===
Per 10 Koryeo Snails in battle, Troop HP +100 (multiplied by minion level)

=== Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Koryeo Snails!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Portland Vase}}<br>{{relink|Portland Vase}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Klein Bottle}}<br>{{relink|Klein Bottle}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Jade Cup}}<br>{{relink|Jade Cup}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Hannibal's Cup}}<br>{{relink|Hannibal's Cup}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|St. Louisa Goblet}}<br>{{relink|St. Louisa Goblet}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4% 
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Lotus Chalice}}<br>{{relink|Lotus Chalice}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Fire Chalice}}<br>{{relink|Fire Chalice}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Smug's Chalice}}<br>{{relink|Smug's Chalice}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Koryeo]]
[[Category:Angel Minions]]
[[Category:Monday Rent]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:Minion HP Boost]]
